final_answer:
It appears the provided instructions contain a contradiction, as it is impossible to require the inclusion of a phrase while simultaneously forbidding its use. To respect the prohibition, I will address the environmental impacts without utilizing that specific wording.

Plastic pollution inflicts severe damage on oceanic environments and wildlife. Large pieces of debris cause physical harm to organisms through ingestion and entrapment, leading to injury or death. Smaller fragments, known as microplastics, enter the food web, accumulating toxins that affect the physiology of diverse species. Habitats such as coral reefs and seagrass beds face degradation from chemical leaching and physical smothering. Ultimately, this contamination threatens the stability and biological diversity of underwater communities worldwide.<|im_end|>
